trace: Confirmed deterministic warnings: 8 metricWrite.unjustified findings across criarPedido, atualizarStatusPedido, cancelarPedido and registrarMovimentacaoEstoque.
Verified read coverage: all written tables (module-owned, MDM and metric) have corresponding read-only usecases with empty writesTables.
Verified lifecycle coverage: create/update/delete/read/list operations are mapped for all aggregates.
Verified layer 3 access: all usecases are layer_3_usecases and no lower layer accesses tables directly.
